RuleSet.Name: libschema/Makefile.am
RuleSet.GenFile:
MAJOR_VERSION=$reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer Name$
MINOR_VERSION=$reference MinorVersion Name$
BUILD_NUMBER=$GeneratingBuild$
RELEASE=$$(MAJOR_VERSION).$$(MINOR_VERSION).$$(BUILD_NUMBER)
SUB_RELEASE=$$(MAJOR_VERSION).$$(MINOR_VERSION)
MAIN_RELEASE=$$(MAJOR_VERSION)
DEPDIR=debug
LT_OBJDIR=.libs
BIN=$$(prefix)/bin/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$$(MAJOR_VERSION).0.$$(MINOR_VERSION)
bindir=$$(prefix)/bin/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$$(MAJOR_VERSION).0.$$(MINOR_VERSION)
lib_LTLIBRARIES=lib$lower SchemaName$.la
lib$lower SchemaName$_ladir=
lib$lower SchemaName$_la_COREdir=$$(prefix)/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$$(MAJOR_VERSION).0.$$(MINOR_VERSION)/$lower SchemaName$
lib$lower SchemaName$_la_OBJdir=$$(prefix)/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$$(MAJOR_VERSION).0.$$(MINOR_VERSION)/$lower SchemaName$obj
lib$lower SchemaName$_la_SOURCES=$fileMakefileAMSources$
lib$lower SchemaName$_la_CORE_HEADERS=$fileMakefileAMCoreHeaders$
lib$lower SchemaName$_la_OBJ_HEADERS=$fileMakefileAMObjHeaders$
lib$lower SchemaName$_la_HEADERS=
lib$lower SchemaName$_la_LDFLAGS= -version-info $$(MAJOR_VERSION):$$(MINOR_VERSION) -lmpfr -lxerces-c -luuid -l:libcflib.so.$$(MAJOR_VERSION).0.$$(MINOR_VERSION)$iterate SchemaRefs( each fileMakefileAM_LDFLAGS empty empty )$ -lstdc++fs
lib$lower PackageName$_la_CXXFLAGS= -I$$(top_srcdir) -I$$(prefix)/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$$(MAJOR_VERSION).0.$$(MINOR_VERSION) -I$$(prefix)/include/$lower poptop SchemaDef reference MinorVersion reference ParentMajVer reference ParentSPrj reference ParentTPrj Name$/$$(MAJOR_VERSION).0.$$(MINOR_VERSION)
ACLOCAL_AMFLAGS= -Im4
RuleSet.GenRule: I$SchemaName$Schema.cpp I$SchemaName$TablePerms.cpp $SchemaName$Schema.cpp $SchemaName$SchemaPool.cpp $SchemaName$Authorization.cpp $SchemaName$ClientConfigurationFile.cpp $SchemaName$ConfigurationFile.cpp $SchemaName$HPKey.cpp I$SchemaName$Public.cpp I$SchemaName$SchemaObj.cpp $SchemaName$SchemaObj.cpp $SchemaName$SchemaPooledObj.cpp I$SchemaName$ObjPublic.cpp $iterate SchemaTables( each fileMakefileAMSources empty empty )$

$switch HasDefSchema yes empty default fileMakefileAMSourcesNoDefSchema$ I$SchemaName$$TableName$Obj.cpp I$SchemaName$$TableName$EditObj.cpp I$SchemaName$$TableName$TableObj.cpp I$SchemaName$$TableName$Table.cpp $SchemaName$$TableName$Obj.cpp $SchemaName$$TableName$EditObj.cpp $SchemaName$$TableName$TableObj.cpp$iterate Index( each fileMakefileAMSourcesIndexFiles empty empty )$

$switch HasSuperClassRelation no fileMakefileAMFilesTablePKeyCpp default empty$$switch HasSuperClassRelation no fileMakefileAMFilesTableHPKeyCpp default empty$ $SchemaName$$TableName$Buff.cpp $SchemaName$$TableName$HBuff.cpp$fileMakefileAMSourcesIndexFilesNoDefSchema$

$lower SchemaName$/I$SchemaName$Schema.hpp $lower SchemaName$/I$SchemaName$Public.hpp $lower SchemaName$/I$SchemaName$TablePerms.hpp $lower SchemaName$/$SchemaName$Schema.hpp $lower SchemaName$/$SchemaName$SchemaPool.hpp $lower SchemaName$/$SchemaName$Authorization.hpp $lower SchemaName$/$SchemaName$ClientConfigurationFile.hpp $lower SchemaName$/$SchemaName$ConfigurationFile.hpp $lower SchemaName$/$SchemaName$HPKey.hpp$iterate SchemaTables( each fileMakefileAMCoreHeaders empty empty )$

$switch HasDefSchema yes empty default fileMakefileAMCoreHeadersNoDefSchema$ $lower SchemaName$/I$SchemaName$$TableName$Table.hpp $iterate Index( each fileMakefileAMCoreHeadersIndexFiles empty empty )$

$switch HasSuperClassRelation no fileMakefileAMCoreHeadersTablePKeyHpp default empty$$switch HasSuperClassRelation no fileMakefileAMCoreHeadersTableHPKeyHpp default empty$ $lower SchemaName$/$SchemaName$$TableName$Buff.hpp $lower SchemaName$/$SchemaName$$TableName$HBuff.hpp$iterate Index( each fileMakefileAMCoreHeadersIndexFilesNoDefSchema empty empty )$

$lower SchemaName$obj/I$SchemaName$SchemaObj.hpp $lower SchemaName$obj/$SchemaName$SchemaObj.hpp $lower SchemaName$obj/$SchemaName$SchemaPooledObj.hpp $lower SchemaName$obj/I$SchemaName$ObjPublic.hpp $iterate SchemaTables( each fileMakefileAMObjHeaders empty empty )$
